subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-08-13 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: It is very strange that up to this time not one Persian has come here just to pay a social call
subcodes.subjects: @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @universality of the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence
